name: Intelex EHS & Sustainability API
what_it_does: Intelex REST API for environment, health, safety (EHS) and sustainability management platform. Enables AI agents to manage safety incidents and near-misses, track environmental metrics, conduct audits and inspections, manage corrective actions, and integrate EHS data with ERP and BI systems. Intelex serves manufacturing, energy, construction, and industrial organizations.
use_cases: Recording and managing safety incidents from EHS automation agents
Tracking environmental compliance metrics from sustainability reporting agents
Conducting and managing audit findings from compliance management agents
Integrating EHS data with operations and BI platforms from enterprise integration agents
not_for: IT-only risk and compliance without physical EHS requirements
Simple safety checklist apps without enterprise EHS management
Non-industrial organizations without EHS regulatory requirements
best_when: A manufacturing, energy, or industrial company using Intelex wants AI agents to automate incident reporting, environmental monitoring, audit management, and EHS data integration.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: EHS data includes worker injury and environmental incident records — sensitive safety and regulatory data. Incorrect incident reporting has regulatory compliance implications.

auth.notes: Intelex uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Enterprise customer credentials via Intelex platform configuration. Token-based auth for all API operations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise EHS platform pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per module and user
pricing.notes: Canadian company (Toronto). Acquired by Ideagen in 2022. Enterprise EHS and sustainability platform. API access with enterprise subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits per API client

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Worker injury and environmental incident records — regulatory implications
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API
Canadian company — GDPR and PIPEDA compliance for global deployments
Ideagen acquisition (2022) may affect product roadmap and documentation
EHS data model varies by module — incidents, audits, compliance, environmental each differ
Regulatory reporting integration (OSHA, EPA) requires accuracy — validate data before submission
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Worker injury and environmental data with regulatory implications. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Canadian company. OAuth2.

security_score_components.security_notes: Worker safety and environmental data with regulatory implications. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Canadian company. OAuth2.
